name: Dream Head Tail to Video
description: AI-powered video generation skill for OpenClaw. Creates videos from head and tail frame inputs using dream-based generation models via API.
review: Gamora reviewed and conditionally approved this skill. Score 6.6/10. Innovative video generation capability with functional implementation but needs better documentation.
notes: CONDITIONAL: Add comprehensive API documentation, improve security for API key handling (avoid plaintext storage), add usage examples with sample outputs.
